name: io.github.ethan-tsai-tsai/thread-analyzer
title: Thread Analyzer
description: Scrape and analyze replies from any public Threads post via MCP tools

tools.name: scrape_thread
tools.description: Scrape replies from a public Threads post URL

tools.name: get_all_replies
tools.description: Return all scraped replies with username and timestamp

tools.name: get_reply_stats
tools.description: Reply count, top commenters, avg length, time range
